name: Ryuuma Shimotsuki
description: __Affiliations:__ Thriller Bark Pirates; Wano Country (prior to death); Shimotsuki Family __Origin:__ Grand Line (Wano Country) __Residence:__ Wano Country (prior to death); Thriller Bark (Post-Mortem) Ryuuma was a legendary samurai from Wano Country who was turned into a General Zombie by Gecko Moria hundreds of years after his death. He is the same Ryuuma from Oda's previous one-shot manga, Monsters. His corpse previously possessed Brook's shadow to animate him while on Thriller Bark.

name: Shiori Fuyumura
description: __Height:__ 182 cm One of [Sanda's](https://anilist.co/character/246680/Kazushige-Sanda) classmates who is unusually tall for her age. She broke the seal on Santa Claus's powers in order to request his help in solving the mysterious disappearance of her friend [Ono](https://anilist.co/character/363834/Ichie-Ono).

name: Ursula
description: An artist in her late teens, who lives -- during the summer, at least -- in a one-room cabin in a wooded area outside of Koriko. She acts as an older sister to Kiki, explaining Kiki's temporary inability to fly in terms of artist's block, and telling her that gifts -- whether the ability to paint, to be a witch, or to bake bread -- must be used, not rejected.

name: Vikir van Baskerville
description: The Hound of the Baskerville Clan who regressed after being cut down by the blade of the guillotine.

name: Aoi Izumisawa
description: Aoi is a cheerful and honest yet reticent girl with a knack for household work. She is also a bright, energetic and straightforward girl who transferred to the Asahi's class. Being a modest person, she is the leader of the class. She is also a jealous type.

name: Arashi Narukami
description: __Unit:__ Knights __Club:__ Track & Field Club __Circles:__ Dramatica, Pretty 5 A self-proclaimed “big sister”. She is skilled at taking care of people and loves cute things. She has a friendly and sociable personality, but can occasionally have extreme mood swings. She has ample self-confidence when it comes to a refined performance and a light, gentle singing voice. name: Asaya Hasekura
description: Isaya is Kensuke Ooshiba's old childhood friend, who had to move away because of his parents. Ken and Isaya made a promise to be together forever. Isaya is in love With Ken.

name: Furano Yukihira
description: Kanade's classmate who is quiet but a little weird. She likes verbally abusing Kanade.

name: Haine
description: Haine is the main antagonist of the Summertime Rendering series. ~!Hiruko is known as the God of Hitogashima and the mother of all Shadows. She takes the form of Haine, the first person she copied. Prior to her current apperance and based on the history and legends of Hitogashima, she took on the form of a whale's shadow.!~

name: Kaho Koyanagi
description: **Height:** 153 cm (5'0") As the group's mascot, Kaho has a playful and fun personality. She enjoys making jokes and has the ability to control the mood of the group. She is referred to as "everyone's little sister" because of her childish personality. ~!Renako is later revealed to be Kaho's childhood friend. Renako was unable to remember who she was because her surname had been changed from Minaguchi to Koyanagi.!~

name: Kei Sugihara
description: A regional boss of the Sakuragi family. For better or worse, he's an honest guy. He gets very emotional, so people tend to tease him. With everything said and done, he respects Kirishima. His hobby is watching movies. His capacity to empathize with others is astounding. He gets so attached to the main characters that he'll often start shouting or bawling his eyes out.

name: Kokkuri-san
description: Height: 5' 8" One of the main characters of Gugure! Kokkuri-san series. He is a fox spirit who was summoned by Kohina Ichimatsu. He began to haunt Kohina after seeing how she lives as a 'doll' and also after seeing her terrible eating habit of cup ramen for every meal. He wanted to help her live better as her current life wasn't suitable for a young girl to grow up in and thus became her legal guardian. He often fights with Inugami over Kohina and her attention. name: Kouta Fujiki
description: A 15-year old God Eater who joins the Far East branch the same day as the protagonist. He is an old-type and wields an assault gun formally used by Tsubaki. He has a mother and younger sister, Nozomi, whom he cares for deeply. (Source: MAL)

description: She is an owner of a mobile tavern, and one of the 7 Legendary Red Barons, known as the "Insight Baron".

description: Saki is Mirai's classmate, his love interest, and coincidentally, a God candidate as well. ~!Once she learns that he does not intend to kill her, Saki joins forces with Mirai to deal with Metropoliman.!~

name: Sasha Yakovleva

description: Sasha Yakovleva is a netrunner and a part of Maine's crew of edgerunners, operating in Night City. ~!Sasha's mother, Galina, died when she was a child because of the side effects of Biotechnica painkillers. During an infiltration of Biotechnica's Night City HQ, Sasha would obtain confidential files on Securicine - the painkillers her mother used while she was sick. name: Shajin
description: A senior manager in the IPC Strategic Investment Department and one of the Ten Stonehearts, known for his cornerstone "Aventurine of stratagems." He always dons a smile that conceals his true intentions and lives by the principle of "the greater the risk, the greater the reward."
